title: Phase 7 — Functional, analytics and launch verification

functional_checks.detail: HeroVideoCta scrolls/focuses #video; no video.play(); preload=metadata only
Production MP4/poster missing; placeholder renders until assets added
VTT present; transcript disclosure works; transcript body still draft placeholder
Native details/summary with focus-visible and 48px min-height
Zod client validation unit cases: empty, valid, bad email, javascript: URL
isSubmitting guard + honeypot + rate limit + lead_id idempotency; live n8n not exercised
Error summary + RequestConfirmation success path present
Form and footer Link to /privacy; privacy route builds
MIT study URL returns HTTP 200 application/pdf; target=_blank rel=noopener noreferrer

analytics_checks.detail: AnalyticsBootstrap once per session with UTMs + device + referrer_domain
sanitizeAnalyticsProps strips name/email/website; only field + error_category
sessionStorage attribution captured and posted with allowlisted keys
Removed leftover example_finding_open and finding_id allowlist entry

credibility_checks.detail: Copy states qualification odds fell 21-fold; audit patterns expanded
Disclosure only: administrative questions, capture, escalation — not unsupervised legal advice
Human where reassurance matters; existing team & CRM anchors
existing CRM + No replacement CRM required

accessibility_and_performance.detail: Skip link, lang=en-GB, focus-visible, 48px controls, sr-only where needed; full AA audit not automated
Native controls + disclosure summaries + form; browser keyboard pass recommended
h1 hero → h2 sections → h3 mechanism stage labels

production_dependencies_remaining: Proofread outline captions/transcript against the final spoken recording
Legal entity registeredName, companyNumber and registeredAddress in lib/site-config.ts
Production N8N_WEBHOOK_URL / N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET + sheet + email DNS
Device test of final MP4 on iPhone Safari and Android Chrome
NEXT_PUBLIC_ANALYTICS_PROVIDER if Plausible (or other) is enabled
